title: Fix Next 15 Edit Transaction Page Props

summary: Refine the Transactions screen with clearer hierarchy, filters, empty/error states, and table readability.

summary: Refine the Reports screen with clearer hierarchy, filter framing, empty states, and report evidence copy.

title: Categories Evidence-First UX Refinement
summary: Refine the Categories screen with clearer hierarchy, evidence framing, safer deletion copy, better empty state, and aligned loading skeletons.

title: Transaction Form Evidence-First UX Refinement
summary: Refine the add/edit transaction form with clearer hierarchy, evidence framing, loading/error states, and helper copy while preserving transaction save behavior.

title: Login Auth Evidence-First UX Refinement
summary: Refine the login and sign-up experience with clearer hierarchy, evidence framing, safer sample-data copy, and aligned authentication error states.

title: App Shell Navigation Evidence-First UX Refinement
summary: Refine the authenticated app shell and navigation with clearer hierarchy, active states, mobile behavior, and evidence-first navigation copy.

title: Page Frame Consistency Evidence-First UX Refinement
summary: Refine BudgetFlow into a premium cinematic savings-app experience with top-dock navigation, motion-style visual markers, financial cockpit frames, glass panels, and verified static coverage while preserving app behavior.

title: Mobile Responsive Motion Polish Evidence-First UX Refinement
summary: Harden the premium top dock, chip navigation, responsive shell density, and lightweight motion system so the cinematic BudgetFlow experience holds up across mobile and desktop.

title: First-Run Sample Data Integrity Evidence-First Refinement
summary: Harden the sign-up starter data path so first-run users receive valid categories and transactions, with static coverage for seed category and description consistency.

title: Google First-Run Seed Parity Evidence-First Refinement
summary: Extend first-run starter data behavior to new Google Sign-In users without seeding existing Google users again, preserving auth and Firestore behavior.
